title: Advanced Training Necessity Statement
body:
Date: {{date}}

To: VR&E Case Manager

Subject: Request for Approval of Graduate / Advanced Training
Veteran: [Your Name]
Case Status Stage: {{stage}}

I request approval of the program {{targetProgram}} because it is reasonably necessary to reach the suitable employment goal of {{targetOccupation}}.

My prior education or work path is not producing suitable employment because: {{whyPriorTrainingFails}}.

This requested program is tied to labor-market or licensure standards as follows: {{licensureNeed}}.

Please evaluate this request under Chapter 31 rehabilitation necessity standards and provide a written decision that explains the evidence considered, the occupation or training alternative relied upon if denying, and the authority supporting that decision.

Respectfully,

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]
